app.title: Show HN: Prompt-to-Excalidraw demo with Gemma 4 E2B in the browser (3.1GB)
app.author: teamchong
app.description: A live demonstration of real-time inference with Gemma 4 in the browser.
proposed_tests: Run inference with a sample dataset in the browser
